assertions.name: stable_metadata
assertions.query: MATCH (d:MarkdownDocument {`src.path`: 'audit-source.md'}) RETURN d.`src.connector`, d.`src.kind`, d.`src.status`, d.`md.title`, d.`md.tags`, d.`md.has_frontmatter`

assertions.name: required_source_fields_present
assertions.query: MATCH (d:MarkdownDocument {`src.path`: 'audit-source.md'}) WHERE d.`src.root` IS NOT NULL AND d.`src.hash` IS NOT NULL AND d.`md.raw` IS NOT NULL AND d.`md.body` IS NOT NULL RETURN d.`src.path`, d.`md.title`

assertions.name: query_citation_metadata
assertions.query: MATCH (d:MarkdownDocument {`src.path`: 'audit-source.md'}) RETURN d.`src.path`, d.`src.status`, d.`src.hash`, d.`md.title`
